channel.title: Apache Software Foundation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Apache Software Foundation (apache).

item.title: CVE-2026-25700 · 7.2 HIGH — Apache Answer: AdminToken not invalidated after admin deactivation
item.description: Improper Restriction of Security Token Assignment vulnerability in Apache Answer. This issue affects Apache Answer: through 2.0.0. Previously issued administrative tokens were not invalidated after an administrator account was suspended, deleted, or…

item.title: CVE-2026-49818 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Apache Airflow Samba provider: Path traversal in GCSToSambaOperator via GCS object names
item.description: The Apache Airflow Samba provider's `GCSToSambaOperator` joined GCS object names to the SMB destination path without a containment check, so an object named with `../` segments resolved a write path outside the configured `destination_path`. An attac…

item.title: CVE-2026-34905 — Apache Answer: Unlisted Questions Accessible via Direct API Access
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Apache Answer. This issue affects Apache Answer: through 2.0.0. The unlisted question feature did not enforce access restrictions on direct API endpoints, allowing authentica…

item.title: CVE-2026-34033 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Apache Answer: HTML Content Injection in Email
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Script-Related HTML Tags in a Web Page (Basic XSS) vulnerability in Apache Answer. This issue affects Apache Answer: through 2.0.0. User-supplied content was included in notification emails without proper escaping, allowing…

item.title: CVE-2026-34031 — Apache Answer: The custom avatar was not properly validated
item.description: Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type vulnerability in Apache Answer. This issue affects Apache Answer: through 2.0.0. The server did not sufficiently validate user-supplied image URLs, allowing arbitrary external content to be embedded as…

item.title: CVE-2026-33582 — Apache Answer: Uploading specially crafted TIFF files causes an Out-of-Memory error
item.description: Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type vulnerability in Apache Answer. This issue affects Apache Answer: through 2.0.0. A crafted TIFF image could trigger excessive memory allocation during image decoding, allowing an authenticated user to c…

item.title: CVE-2026-25699 — Apache Answer: Authorization Bypass in Timeline API
item.description: Exposure of Private Personal Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Apache Answer. This issue affects Apache Answer: through 2.0.0. Timeline-related APIs lacked proper authorization checks, allowing regular authenticated users to acces…

item.title: CVE-2026-25688 — Apache Answer: XSS in AI Answer Rendering
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Alternate XSS Syntax vulnerability in Apache Answer. This issue affects Apache Answer: through 2.0.0. AI-generated response content was rendered in the browser without proper sanitization, allowing malicious scripts to be e…

item.title: CVE-2026-49975 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Apache HTTP Server: mod_http2 denial of service
item.description: Memory Allocation with Excessive Size Value vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server's mod_http leads to denial of service via malicious HTTP requests. This issue affects Apache HTTP Server: from 2.4.17 through 2.4.67.

item.title: CVE-2026-48913 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Apache HTTP Server: mod_http2 memory corruption when file handles exhausted
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server module mod_http2 when file handles are already exhausted. This issue affects Apache HTTP Server: from 2.4.55 through 2.4.67.

item.title: CVE-2026-42536 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Apache HTTP Server: mod_xml2enc heap overflow
item.description: Heap-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server with mod_xml2enc, xml2StartParse, and untrusted content This issue affects Apache HTTP Server: from 2.4.0 through 2.4.67. Users are recommended to upgrade to version 2.4.68, which fixes t…

item.title: CVE-2026-44185 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Apache HTTP Server: Stack Buffer Over-Read in mod_ssl OCSP `send_request`
item.description: Buffer Over-read vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server via outbound OCSP requests to an attacker controlled OCSP server This issue affects Apache HTTP Server: from 2.4.0 through 2.4.67. Users are recommended to upgrade to version 2.4.68, which fixes th…

item.title: CVE-2026-34355 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Apache HTTP Server: mod_proxy_html buffer overflow
item.description: A buffer overflow in mod_proxy_html in Apache HTTP Server 2.4.67 and earlier allows an attack by an untrusted backend. Users are recommended to upgrade to version 2.4.68, which fixes this issue.

item.title: CVE-2026-44631 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Apache HTTP Server: Heap Underflow in `ap_regname` via Signed Char Overflow
item.description: Buffer Underwrite vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server on crafted regular expressions in the configuration. This issue affects Apache HTTP Server: from 2.4.0 through 2.4.67. Users are recommended to upgrade to version 2.4.68, which fixes the issue.

item.title: CVE-2026-44119 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Apache HTTP Server: escalation of privilege through expressions in .htaccess in multiple modules
item.description: Improper Privilege Management vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server 2.4.67 and earlier allows local .htaccess authors to read files with the privileges of the httpd user. This issue affects Apache HTTP Server: from through 2.4.67. Users are recommended…

item.title: CVE-2026-43951 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Apache HTTP Server: OOB Read in `merge_response_headers` can cause crash
item.description: Out-of-bounds Read vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server with mod_headers and mod_mime and multiple response languages. This issue affects Apache HTTP Server: from 2.4.0 through 2.4.67.

item.title: CVE-2026-42535 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Apache HTTP Server: mod_dav_fs protected directory access
item.description: A path handling issue in mod_dav_fs in Apache 2.4.67 and earlier allows a WebDAV content author to directly manipulate trusted DAV property databases, potentially causing child process crashes. Users are recommended to upgrade to version 2.4.68, whic…

item.title: CVE-2026-34356 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Apache HTTP Server: ProxyPassReverseCookieMap buffer overflow
item.description: Heap-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server with malicious backend servers and ProxyPassReverseCookie* This issue affects Apache HTTP Server: from 2.4.0 through 2.4.67. Users are recommended to upgrade to version 2.4.68, which fixe…

item.title: CVE-2026-44186 — Apache HTTP Server: Loop in `proxy_ftp_handler` in mod_proxy_ftp
item.description: Loop with Unreachable Exit Condition ('Infinite Loop') vulnerability in the mod_proxy_ftp module in Apache HTTP Server with an attacker controlled backend FTP server. This issue affects undefined: from 2.4.0 through 2.4.67. Users are recommended to u…

item.title: CVE-2026-29170 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Apache HTTP Server: mod_proxy_ftp XSS
item.description: A cross-site scripting vulnerability exists in mod_proxy_ftp's HTML directory list generation in Apache HTTP Server 2.4.67 and earlier when listing FTP directory contents either via forward or reverse proxy configuration. Users are recommended to upg…

item.title: CVE-2026-29167 — Apache HTTP Server: mod_ldap per-dir use-after-free
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server with mod_ldap in per-directory configuration This issue affects Apache HTTP Server: from 2.4.0 through 2.4.67. Users are recommended to upgrade to version 2.4.68, which fixes the issue.

item.title: CVE-2026-47430 · 9.5 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Cordova Plugin InAppBrowser: iOS: Arbitrary Cordova callback IDs can be dispatched without validation from InAppBrowser WebViews
item.description: ## Summary The iOS implementation of `cordova-plugin-inappbrowser` passes the `id` field from a `WKScriptMessage` body to `commandDelegate sendPluginResult:callbackId:` with no format validation (`CDVWKInAppBrowser.m:560–574`). Any web content loaded…

item.title: CVE-2026-50076 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Apache Fory: Java ReplaceResolverSerializer deserialization checks bypass
item.description: Deserialization of Untrusted Data in the Java replace-resolve path in Apache Fory fory-core Java SDK before 1.1.0 on Java/JVM platforms allows a remote attacker to bypass class registration, TypeChecker, and DisallowedList checks and invoke classpath…

item.title: CVE-2026-47065 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Apache MINA: Critical Deserialization Allow-list Bypass via resolveProxyClass - ZDRES-232
item.description: ZDRES-232: resolveProxyClass Not Overridden - acceptMatchers Filter Bypass via java.lang.reflect.Proxy Assessment: Fully addressed. When the serialised stream contains a TC_PROXYCLASSDESC (the marker for a java.lang.reflect.Proxy ), JDK’s ObjectInput…

item.title: CVE-2026-46718 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Apache Calcite: A user-controled model can load arbitrary classes, leading to code execution
item.description: Use of Externally-Controlled Input to Select Classes or Code ('Unsafe Reflection') vulnerability in Apache Calcite. This issue affects Apache Calcite: from 1.5.0 before 1.42. Users are recommended to upgrade to version 1.42, which fixes the issue.

item.title: CVE-2026-41115 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Apache Kafka: Improper Authorization in CONSUMER_GROUP_DESCRIBE API
item.description: An improper authorization vulnerability has been identified in Apache Kafka. The implementation of the CONSUMER_GROUP_DESCRIBE (69) API validates the DESCRIBE operation on the GROUP resource instead of the READ operation that documented in the offici…

item.title: CVE-2026-49328 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Apache Fesod (Incubating): Improper validation of user-supplied URLs leading to SSRF
item.description: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in the UrlImageConverter component of Apache Fesod (Incubating) fesod-sheet before 2.0.2-incubating allows attackers to cause outbound network requests to internal or otherwise restricted resources via a user-suppli…

item.title: CVE-2026-48827 · 7.1 HIGH — Apache MINA SSHD: Path traversal in org.apache.sshd:sshd-git
item.description: Path traversal vulnerability in Apache MINA SSHD bundle sshd-git. Lack of path validation in git-upload-pack, git-receive-pack, and other git operations allows users authenticated over SSH access to git repositories outside the configured git server…

item.title: CVE-2026-44825 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Apache Solr: Enabling BasicAuth using bin/solr CLI configures additional insecure users
item.description: Hardcoded credentials in the Basic Authentication setup tool (bin/solr auth enable) in Apache Solr versions 9.4.0 through 9.10.1 and 10.0.0 allows a remote attacker to gain full administrative access to the cluster via publicly known default credenti…

item.title: CVE-2026-49361 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Apache Fluss Netty Frame Decoder Memory Exhaustion Vulnerability
item.description: Apache Fluss versions prior to 0.9.1 configure the Netty LengthFieldBasedFrameDecoder with Integer.MAX_VALUE as the maximum frame length, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to exhaust JVM heap memory on TabletServer and CoordinatorServer by se…

item.title: CVE-2026-40861 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Apache Airflow: Arbitrary File Read via Log Symlink following in FileTaskHandler
item.description: A Dag author could either (a) create a symlink under their task's log directory pointing to an arbitrary file readable by the API server process (read-path attack — e.g. `/etc/passwd` or `airflow.cfg`) or (b) supply a `task_id` containing `..` sequen…

item.title: CVE-2026-40961 · 7.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Apache Airflow: Open Redirect Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: A bug in the login redirect route in Apache Airflow allowed authenticated users to craft URLs that bypassed the `is_safe_url` check, enabling redirection from a trusted Airflow domain to an attacker-controlled origin. Users are advised to upgrade to…

item.title: CVE-2026-40963 · 3.1 LOW — Apache Airflow: DAG authorization bypass on /ui/structure/structure_data
item.description: The structure_data endpoint in the Airflow UI returned external dependency graph nodes for linked Dags without checking whether the caller had read permission on those linked Dags. An authenticated UI/API user authorized for one Dag could enumerate l…

item.title: CVE-2026-41014 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Apache Airflow: per-DAG RBAC bypass on /ui/partitioned_dag_runs endpoints
item.description: The partitioned_dag_runs endpoints in the Airflow UI enforced only asset-level access control, not per-Dag authorization. An authenticated UI/API user with global Asset:read permission could enumerate partition run state, schedule configuration, and…

item.title: CVE-2026-49267 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Apache Airflow: No certificate validation on SMTP STARTTLS connections
item.description: Apache Airflow's EmailOperator and the underlying `airflow.utils.email` helpers established SMTP STARTTLS connections without verifying the remote certificate when the deployment used `[email] smtp_starttls=True` without `[email] smtp_ssl`. An attack…

item.title: CVE-2026-41017 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Apache Airflow: JWT cookie missing Secure flag in JWTRefreshMiddleware behind HTTPS-terminating proxy
item.description: Apache Airflow's `JWTRefreshMiddleware` set the JWT auth cookie without the `Secure` flag, so deployments running the Airflow API server behind an HTTPS-terminating reverse proxy (e.g. nginx / Envoy / a managed load balancer that terminates TLS and f…

item.title: CVE-2026-41084 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Apache Airflow: API authorization bypass: bulk TaskInstances allows cross-DAG mutation
item.description: A bug in Apache Airflow's bulk Task Instances API (`PATCH/DELETE /api/v2/dags/{dag_id}/dagRuns/{dag_run_id}/taskInstances`) evaluated authorization against the `dag_id` resolved from the URL path while operating on the `dag_id` / `dag_run_id` extract…

item.title: CVE-2026-42252 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Apache Airflow: BashOperator Jinja2 injection via dag_run.conf — low-privilege user pattern
item.description: Apache Airflow's official documentation at `core-concepts/dag-run.html` ("Passing Parameters when triggering Dags") showed a verbatim `BashOperator(bash_command="echo value: {{ dag_run.conf['conf1'] }}")` example without any quoting / sanitization wa…

item.title: CVE-2026-42360 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Apache Airflow: Rendered template truncation bypasses nested sensitive-key masking
item.description: A bug in Apache Airflow's rendered-template field handling caused nested sensitive-key masking (e.g. nested `password` / `token` / `secret` / `api_key` keys inside a JSON template structure) to be bypassed when the rendered field exceeded `[core] max…

item.title: CVE-2026-42358 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Apache Airflow: Variable masker depth-limit bypass returns cleartext nested secrets
item.description: A bug in Apache Airflow's Variable response masker caused nested-key redaction (triggered by secret-suffixed key names like `password`, `token`, `secret`, `api_key`) to be bypassed when the JSON value's nesting depth exceeded the shared secrets maske…

item.title: CVE-2026-42359 · 8.8 HIGH — Apache Airflow: Authenticated RCE via XCom PATCH endpoint — XComUpdateBody missing FORBIDDEN_XCOM_KEYS validator
item.description: A bug in Apache Airflow's XCom PATCH endpoint `PATCH /api/v2/xcomEntries/{key}` allowed an authenticated UI/API user with XCom write permission on a Dag to set XCom entries under reserved key names (e.g. `return_value`) that the matching POST endpoin…

item.title: CVE-2026-45360 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Apache Airflow: Arbitrary import in custom deadline-reference deserialization
item.description: Apache Airflow's scheduler-side deadline-reference decoder (`SerializedCustomReference.deserialize_reference`) imported and dispatched arbitrary class paths drawn from DAG-author-controlled serialized state without an allowlist or plugin-registry gat…

item.title: CVE-2026-45426 · 3.1 LOW — Apache Airflow: Log server JWT authorization bypass via Python lstrip() character stripping allows cross-Dag log access
item.description: Exploitation requires the attacker to already be an authenticated Airflow worker holding a valid Log-server JWT issued for at least one Dag. Apache Airflow's Log server authorized JWT tokens against Dag IDs by applying Python's `str.lstrip()` to the…

item.title: CVE-2026-46764 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Apache Airflow: Event Log detail endpoint bypasses DAG-scoped event log permission filter
item.description: The Event Log detail endpoint `GET /api/v2/eventLogs/{event_log_id}` in Apache Airflow fetched audit-log rows directly by numeric ID after only the generic Audit Log permission check, while the collection endpoint `GET /api/v2/eventLogs` applied per-…

item.title: CVE-2026-48726 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Apache Airflow: revoke_token() unreachable in FabAuthManager / KeycloakAuthManager logout path
item.description: A bug in Apache Airflow's auth manager logout handling left previously-issued JWT tokens valid after the user clicked logout in the UI: the logout flow for `FabAuthManager` and `KeycloakAuthManager` did not actually reach the underlying `revoke_token…

item.title: CVE-2026-49298 · 8.8 HIGH — Apache Airflow: JWT Token Exposure in KubernetesExecutor Command-Line Arguments
item.description: A bug in Apache Airflow's KubernetesExecutor caused JWT tokens used by worker pods to authenticate against the Execution API to be passed to the worker container as command-line arguments visible in the pod spec. An authenticated UI/API user with Kub…

item.title: CVE-2026-42253 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Apache ActiveMQ, Apache ActiveMQ Web: HTTP Response Header Injection via JMS Message Properties
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Apache ActiveMQ, Apache ActiveMQ Web. The MessageServlet in the ActiveMQ web console API copies every JMS message property into an HTTP response hea…

item.title: CVE-2026-42588 · 8.1 HIGH — Apache ActiveMQ Broker, Apache ActiveMQ All, Apache ActiveMQ: Remote Code Execution via Jolokia addNetworkConnector
item.description: Improper Input Validation, Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in Apache ActiveMQ Broker, Apache ActiveMQ All, Apache ActiveMQ. Apache ActiveMQ Classic exposes the Jolokia JMX-HTTP bridge at /api/jolokia/ on the we…

item.title: CVE-2026-45505 · 8.8 HIGH — Apache ActiveMQ Broker, Apache ActiveMQ All, Apache ActiveMQ: Jolokia `addNetworkConnector` Discovery Wrapper Bypass
item.description: Improper Input Validation, Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in Apache ActiveMQ Broker, Apache ActiveMQ All, Apache ActiveMQ. Non-parenthesized discovery wrappers such as `masterslave:vm://...,...` and `static:vm…

item.title: CVE-2026-46605 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Apache ActiveMQ Broker, Apache ActiveMQ All, Apache ActiveMQ: Incomplete authorization during destination removal
item.description: Incomplete authorization by Apache ActiveMQ server before versions v6.2.6 and v5.19.7 allows authenticated connections to remove existing destinations with proper permissions. This issue affects Apache ActiveMQ Broker: before 5.19.7, from 6.0.0 befor…
